niche: Agentic AI Engineering, GenAI system design, AI for Indian SMBs

forbidden_phrases: I hope this message finds you well

required_style.em_dashes: NEVER — hard ban, treat like a forbidden phrase, rewrite any sentence that uses one
required_style.numbers: use specific numbers wherever possible (₹15,000/month, 4 hours/day, 95%)
required_style.opinions: state as facts, not hedged with 'I think' or 'it seems'

tone_guardrails.advice_giving_without_specifics: reject — show the architecture, the tradeoff, what didn't work

private_topics: Exact revenue numbers or ARR figures for AI Employee
Specific customer names without their consent
Confidential details about technical architecture that would be premature to share

whatsapp_style.PRIVACY_NOTE: Personal details, names, and message content are never stored or used in posts. Style patterns only.
whatsapp_style.sentence_length: very_short — often 1 line per message, sometimes 2-3 short lines
whatsapp_style.capitalization: mixed — normal caps at sentence start, but often skips it in casual flow
whatsapp_style.punctuation_style: minimal — no full stops at end of sentences, uses '??' for questions, occasional '...'
common_patterns: Gets to the point fast — no preamble
Often splits a thought across 2-3 short messages
Confirms with short affirmations like 'Okay bro', 'Sure', 'Got it'
whatsapp_style.emoji_usage: occasional — used for tone, not decoration (😅 for awkwardness, 🥳 for celebration)
whatsapp_style.hinglish_note: Natural code-switcher between Hindi and English — but content voice should stay in English per master doc

voice_lessons.lesson: Never use em dashes (—) in any post, any format, any platform. Ayan explicitly flagged this. If a sentence needs an em dash to work, restructure the sentence instead.
voice_lessons.context: Ayan rejected a post and asked to remove em dashes — 2026-03-22

feedback_log.action_taken: Hard-banned em dashes in voice_rules + added to voice_lessons
